channel.title: Colima on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Colima on DevOpsTales

item.title: Run Linux VM on macOS with Lima and Colima
item.description: Running Linux virtual machines on macOS has become essential for developers working with containers, Kubernetes, and cloud-native technologies. Lima (Linux on macOS) and Colima (Containers on Lima) provide an elegant solution for running Linux workloads on Mac with minimal overhead and maximum compatibility.
